name: Wild Rice-Pine Nut Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Pine nuts or any chopped nut
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the wild rice in the water until tender, about 1 hour. Add more water if needed.
2. Meanwhile, sauté the green onion, garlic, pine nuts (or other chopped nut), and dried thyme in vegetable oil.
3. Mix in the cooked wild rice and simmer for 10 minutes to blend the flavors.
4. Cool enough to stuff into quail or one Cornish hen (or serve with chicken).
Note: Pine nuts are very expensive and do not have a strong flavor. Sunflower seeds can be used as an alternative at a lower cost.
